name: Pandemic
description: Pandemic is a cooperative game where 2-4 players are members of a disease-control team racing to stop four global outbreaks. Each player has a unique role with special abilities; on a turn you spend action points to move, treat infected cities, share knowledge, or build research stations toward curing all four diseases before they overwhelm you. Tightly tuned tension between treating outbreaks and making long-term progress.
